Profile.title: Hey, I'm Takuya Nemoto
Profile.description:
A full stack developer who loves to code and learn new things.

Looking for a new opportunity to contribute to new projects.

About.subtitle:
You will find more information about me in this section.

I have sufficient knowledge to work as a full stack developer.
About.introduction:
Throughout my career as an engineer, I have worked on two significant projects. The first one was a machine learning project where I primarily utilized Python to develop a product handling image classification and object detection. In the second project, I have been involved in developing a web application leveraging GIS data using React.js, a JavaScript framework.

Looking ahead, I aspire to become a full-stack engineer capable of handling both front-end and back-end development while honing my existing skills.

Projects.subtitle:
These are my projects that I have worked on.

Currently I am working on another project which will appear here soon.
Projects.project1:
Food WebGIS is a web application that allows users to search for restaurants in any area of the world.

Users can also check the weather around the searched location.

It is built using Next.js and different kinds of APIs, such as Google Maps API, OpenWeather API, and Yelp API.
Projects.project2:
Card Deck is a simple card deck that allows users to control each card on the board.

Users can create a room and invite other players to join the room.

The room state can be stored in a database, and can be accessed with crendentials.

It is built using Next.js, MongoDB, WebSocket, and so on.

Contact.subtitle:
You can contact me by filling the contact form below.

Looking forward to your message!
